project_type: Python trading system (backtest + live trading) for XAUUSD
build_system: pip for dependencies, no formal build system
test_framework: No formal test framework - validation by running the script
verification_instructions: 1. Verify AST parses without errors. 2. Verify the core functions (compute_rsi, compute_atr, signal logic, position sizing) are EXACT copies from run_aggressive_backtest.py. 3. Verify best_params match aggressive_results.json exactly.
setup_instructions: MetaTrader5 package is Windows-only and cannot be installed in this sandbox. Validation is AST-based.
environment_constraints: MetaTrader5 Python package requires Windows + MT5 terminal installed. Cannot pip install or run in this Linux sandbox. Code must be validated via AST parsing and manual review of logic matching.
contribution_requirements: Commit to branch hft-scalper-v2 with message: feat: add Python live trader with zero-discrepancy from backtest
key_patterns: Core functions in run_aggressive_backtest.py: compute_rsi(close, period) with Wilder smoothing, compute_atr(high, low, close, period), dual RSI signal logic (RSI 8 fast + RSI 14 slow), 4-bar reversal pattern, two-mode position sizing with dd_power exponential scaling, streak boost. Constants: SLIPPAGE=0.15, COMMISSION_PER_LOT=7.0, CONTRACT_SIZE=100.0, INITIAL_EQUITY=1000.0
directory_structure: hft_scalper/ - main package with backtest engine, strategies, data_loader. tick_data/ - historical tick data. Various .mq5 files at root for MT5 Expert Advisors.
